result.stdout:
Contentful ModelsCreator 0.9.1

Creates c# classes from a Contentful content model.

Usage: contentful.modelscreator.cli [options]

Options:
  --version                       Show version information
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information
  -a|--api-key <API_KEY>          The Contentful API key for the Content Delivery API
  -s|--space-id <SPACE_ID>        The space id to fetch content types from
  -n|--namespace <NAMESPACE>      The namespace the classes should be created in
  -e|--environment <ENVIRONMENT>  The environment to fetch the content model from
  -f|--force                      Automatically overwrite files that already exist
  -p|--path <PATH>                Path to the file or directory to create files in
